name: Eekso — Courtyard Skirmish (map demo)
dmNotes: MAP DEMO built by Claude 2026-07-10 from Wes's Eekso courtyard image. Grid 128px (16×12 cells). Party enters over the south bridge — that area is pre-revealed; the rest is fog. The ettin token is HIDDEN (double-click it in the 🗺 editor to show players when it charges out of the dark). ⚔ tab is pre-stocked: 4 linked PCs + the ettin. Delete or reskin freely — this is a demo.
scriptText:
# The Courtyard

The bridge planks creak under your boots. Beyond them the ruin opens into a broad courtyard — cracked orange earth, old blood-dark stains, and crumbling arched walls swallowing every sound.

Then the roar comes again. **Closer.** Two voices in it, snarling over each other from the same throat — and something enormous moves in the shadows of the north arches.

> [!dm] The ettin is fogged + hidden. When it charges: reveal the fog toward it, double-click its token to unhide, 📤 Send, and roll initiative in ⚔.
